title: Press Release & News Mention
description: Schema for press releases and news mentions about B2B companies.

headline.description: Headline or title of the press release or news article. Commonly found in: h1 tag, og:title meta tag, article headline.

company_name.description: Primary company mentioned or featured. Commonly found in: press release header, article body company mention, company byline.

company_domain.description: Website domain of the primary company. Commonly found in: company website link, press release footer, company profile link.

publication_name.description: Name of the publication or newswire. Commonly found in: site header, og:site_name meta tag, publication byline.

author.description: Author of the article or press release. Commonly found in: byline, author metadata, article header.

publish_date.description: Date the article or press release was published. Commonly found in: publish date metadata, article date display, article:published_time meta tag.

mention_type.description: Category of the news mention. Commonly found in: article topic classification, press release category, news tag.

summary.description: Short summary or lead paragraph. Commonly found in: article lead paragraph, meta description, article excerpt.

full_text.description: Full text content of the press release or article. Commonly found in: article body, press release full text, main content area.

sentiment.description: Inferred sentiment of the mention. Commonly found in: NLP sentiment analysis, tone of article, headline framing.

quote_from_exec.description: Notable executive quote from the article. Commonly found in: quote block in article, press release executive quote, highlighted quote.

related_companies.description: Other companies mentioned in the article. Commonly found in: article body company mentions, related companies section, linked company names.

related_products.description: Products mentioned in the article. Commonly found in: article body product mentions, product name references, launch announcement names.

page_title.description: Title of the source page. Tabstack auto-fills this from page metadata when left empty.

favicon.description: Favicon URL of the source page. Tabstack auto-fills this from page metadata when left empty.
